title: B-103 Draft GST/HST Technical Information Bulletin B-103, Harmonized Sales Tax – Place of supply rules for determining whether a supply is made in a province - Canada.ca
content:
## B-103 Draft GST/HST Technical Information Bulletin B-103, Harmonized Sales Tax – Place of supply rules for determining whether a supply is made in a province

## Notice to the reader
This publication has been cancelled and has been replaced by GST/HST Memorandum 3-3-2, Place of Supply in a Province – Overview .
